parameters.query: SELECT * FROM sn_error_encyclopedia WHERE LOWER(error_pattern) LIKE '%' || LOWER(SUBSTRING($1, 1, 80)) || '%' OR similarity(LOWER(title), LOWER($2)) > 0.3 ORDER BY verified DESC, helpful_count DESC LIMIT 3

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value: =[{"role":"system","content":"ServiceNow error expert. Return ONLY JSON: {\"title\":\"short name\",\"description\":\"what it means\",\"root_cause\":\"why it happens\",\"fix_steps\":[\"step1\",\"step2\",\"step3\"],\"category\":\"Script|API|Flow|DB|Auth|Spoke|Platform\",\"severity\":\"low|medium|high|critical\",\"prevention\":\"how to avoid\"}"},{"role":"user","content":"ServiceNow error: \"{{ $json.error_message }}\"\n{{ $json.context ? 'Context: ' + $json.context : '' }}"}]

parameters.query: INSERT INTO sn_error_encyclopedia (error_pattern, title, description, root_cause, fix_steps, category, severity, source) VALUES (SUBSTRING($1,1,200), $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb, $6, $7, 'ai_generated') ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

parameters.jsCode:
const dbData = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { success: true, source: 'encyclopedia', errors: dbData.db_results, ai_needed: false } }];
return [{ json: { success: false, error: $json.error || 'Invalid input' } }];
